title: scandicium stellatum var. glabrum
intro: Scandicium stellatum var. glabrum, also known as Mountain St. John's Wort, is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit the reuptake of serotonin, a neurotransmitter that helps regulate mood. The health benefits of Scandicium stellatum var. glabrum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. Scandicium stellatum var. glabrum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote relaxation and well-being.
